a200-1.description: 3 hooks still above 3s p95 threshold (09-financial-check.sh 4154ms, 05-smoke-test.sh 3307ms, 36-circuit-reset.sh 3305ms). All stable/improving — monitor.
a200-1.resolution: PARTIALLY IMPROVED but new regression surfaced. 09-financial-check.sh improved to p95=3915ms (was 4154ms, trend=improving). 05-smoke-test.sh p95=3273ms (was 3307ms, stable). 36-circuit-reset.sh p95=3305ms (unchanged, stable). However, 02-periodic-checks.sh has emerged as NEW worst offender at p95=10175ms with degrading trend — platform-health sub-check timing out at 10s on every execution (100% timeout rate at s20, s1780, s1800). Total slow hooks went from 3 to 5, degrading_count from 0 to 2.

a200-2.description: d071 test coverage continuing organic drift: critical-path 81% (was 88% at close), combined 56% (was 59%). Monitor only.
a200-2.resolution: UNCHANGED. Critical-path still 81%, combined still 56%. Drift plateaued. No active directive addresses this. d071 is closed. Acceptable monitoring state.
